description: engine/*.hexa produces zero runtime failures (STUBs allowed)
actual_cmd: bash -c 'fail=0; for f in engine/*.hexa; do [ "$(basename $f)" = "__init__.hexa" ] && continue; out=$(timeout 30 ~/.hx/bin/hexa run "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; echo "$out" | grep -qE "^STUB:|STUB \(" && continue; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && fail=$((fail+1)); done; [ $fail -eq 0 ] && echo 1 || echo 0'
